properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let us build the pyramid All the builders Saw a stone With a particular shape But they had no revelation That the top of the pyramid Would require a stone Rejected by the builders.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let it come down oh Lord, Just inside of my soul, And remain right there In the deepness of my heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let it come down oh Lord, Just inside of my soul, And be there forever, In the deepness of my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Daniel saw a special stone, Cut out without hands, Break into pieces That the image of the vision Then the stone became after A great mountain in those days, Filling with the whole earth, With its glory and it's grace.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Foxes have got their holes, Birds have their nest, But that stone, It has got no place to rest, Than in revelation 10 The capstone just came down. To rest in the bride, Who must be the word itself.
